# awsext_qconnect_ai_prompt (Resource)

Creates and manages an Amazon Q in Connect AI Prompt (qconnect:CreateAIPrompt). Fields other than `template_configuration`, `visibility_status`, and `tags` force replacement when changed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "awsext_qconnect_ai_prompt" "example" {
  assistant_id      = awsext_qconnect_assistant.example.assistant_id
  name              = "example-prompt"
  type              = "ANSWER_GENERATION"
  api_format        = "ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_MESSAGES"
  model_id          = "anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620-v1:0"
  template_type     = "TEXT"
  visibility_status = "PUBLISHED"

  template_configuration = <<-YAML
    system: You are a helpful assistant.
    messages:
      - role: user
        content: "{{question}}"
  YAML
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_format` (String) API format for the AI Prompt. One of ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_MESSAGES, ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_TEXT_COMPLETIONS, MESSAGES, TEXT_COMPLETIONS. The ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_* variants are deprecated; prefer MESSAGES or TEXT_COMPLETIONS.
- `assistant_id` (String) Identifier of the parent Amazon Q in Connect assistant.
- `model_id` (String) Identifier of the model used for this AI Prompt (e.g. anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620-v1:0).
- `name` (String) Name of the AI Prompt.
- `template_configuration` (String) YAML text for the AI Prompt template (passed verbatim to the qconnect API). The `NormalizeJSONString` plan modifier suppresses cosmetic whitespace-only diffs if the content happens to be JSON.
- `template_type` (String) Type of the prompt template. Currently the only supported value is TEXT.
- `type` (String) Type of the AI Prompt, indicating its purpose. Examples: ANSWER_GENERATION, QUERY_REFORMULATION, INTENT_LABELING_GENERATION, SELF_SERVICE_PRE_PROCESSING, SELF_SERVICE_ANSWER_GENERATION, ORCHESTRATION, NOTE_TAKING.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the AI Prompt.
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to assign to the AI Prompt.
- `visibility_status` (String) Visibility status of the AI Prompt. One of PUBLISHED or SAVED. Defaults to SAVED when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `ai_prompt_arn` (String) ARN of the AI Prompt.
- `ai_prompt_id` (String) Service-assigned UUID of the AI Prompt.
